text.title: python-poetry-setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Four antipatterns each with symptom / root-cause / fix.

antipattern.symptom: Every install regenerates the lockfile; transitive deps differ between PRs; "works on my machine" returns.
antipattern.root-cause: Confusion with caches that ARE gitignored.
antipattern.fix: Remove from .gitignore; commit the file; gate via pre-commit hook checking it exists.

antipattern.description: Bare `poetry update` run on a shared repo.
antipattern.symptom: Massive lockfile diff; another dev's staged changes overwritten; merge conflicts on every push.
antipattern.fix: Use `poetry update <pkg>` to bump one package; document the rule in CONTRIBUTING.md.

antipattern.description: `poetry install` in the final Docker production stage.
antipattern.symptom: Image > 200MB; Poetry runtime + dev deps ship to production.
antipattern.fix: Multi-stage: builder exports requirements.txt; final stage runs pip install. Image drops by 100-150MB.

antipattern.symptom: Solver slow (10x); cryptic conflict errors when a dep narrows the range.
antipattern.fix: Pin tight: `python = "^3.11"`. Solver speeds up; conflicts produce clear messages.
